#Requirements

The requirements for 'RyuujiSceneNo59' are as follows:

	uMod version: 2.9.0 or newer
	Unity version: 2021.3.45f2

#Content

The content types fhat can be included for '%RyuujiSceneNo59' are as follows:

	Scene mods: Yes
	Prefab mods: Yes
	Script mods: Yes

The parent folder of this file called 'RyuujiSceneNo59' is known as the 'Mod Folder' and this is where all mod content should be placed in order for it to be exported.
Any content that is not inside this folder will not be exported unless they are a dependancy for another asset, For example, a material.
You can organize your assets into sub folders but bear in mind that the asset will retain its local path when built so when loading assets dynamically you may need to specify the local path instead of the asset name in order to avoid conflicts.

# RyuujiSceneNo59 — Environment Mod for Warudo

这是一个适用于 URP 的风格化太空舞台，包含了特效、Volume 配置以及动态物体，并且可以通过配套的 Playground 脚本进行控制。
我将它命名为 RyuujiSceneNo59。

This is a stylized space stage designed for URP, featuring visual effects, Volume settings, and dynamic objects. It can also be controlled through the included Playground script.
I named this scene RyuujiSceneNo59.

感谢你的支持！
